text: In this curious space, I’m enveloped by quiet hums, screens, and walls adorned with the promise of innovation—R+D. The atmosphere is simultaneously open and guarded, designed for thought and connection, yet also for observation. I sense an undercurrent of anticipation, as if ideas are lingering just out of reach. The angular perspectives and glowing panels spark my curiosity, yet make me slightly uneasy, as though I am both welcome and under scrutiny. I catch myself reflecting on the hidden layers behind every modern façade, feeling the subtle tension between curiosity and caution. There is beauty in the unknown here, but it is edged with the odd serenity of being studied.
